```
+function createTabEditor(): LexicalEditor {

+    nodes: allEditNodes,
+    theme: editorTheme,
+    onError: (error: Error) => {

+
+function createTabEditorFromState(
+  state: SerializedEditorState,
+): LexicalEditor {

+  const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(state)
+  editor.setEditorState(editorState)
+  return editor
+}
```

```
    37	  useEffect(() => {
    38	    if (tabs.length === 0) return
    39	    if (tabs.some((tab) => tab.label === activeTab)) return
    40	    setActiveTab(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
    41	  }, [activeTab, tabs])
    42	
    43	  if (tabs.length === 0) return null
    44	
    45	  return (
    46	    <div className="rich-tabs">
    47	      <div className="rich-tabs-list-wrapper">
    48	        <div className="rich-tabs-list" ref={listRef}>
    49	          {tabs.map((tab) => (
    50	            <button
    51	              key={tab.label}
    52	              type="button"
    53	              className="rich-tabs-trigger"
    54	              data-selected={tab.label === activeTab ? '' : undefined}
    55	              onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.label)}
    56	              ref={(el: HTMLButtonElement | null) => {
    57	                if (el) tabRefs.current.set(tab.label, el)
    58	                else tabRefs.current.delete(tab.label)
    59	              }}
    60	            >
    61	              {tab.label}
    62	            </button>
    63	          ))}
    64	
    65	          <div
    66	            className="rich-tabs-indicator"
    67	            style={{ left: indicator.left, width: indicator.width }}
    68	            aria-hidden
    69	          />
    70	        </div>
    71	
    72	        <div className="rich-tabs-separator" />
    73	      </div>
    74	
    75	      <div className="rich-tabs-content-wrapper">
    76	        {tabs.map((tab) => (
    77	          <div
    78	            key={tab.label}
    79	            className="rich-tabs-content"
    80	            hidden={tab.label !== activeTab}
    81	          >
    82	            {tab.label === activeTab && (
    83	              <RichRenderer
    84	                value={tab.content}
    85	                theme={colorScheme}
    86	                rendererConfig={rendererConfig}
    87	              />
    88	            )}
    89	          </div>
    90	        ))}
    91	      </div>
    92	    </div>
    93	  )
    94	}
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 18:38:30Z)**_

**Findings**
1. `medium` `TabsEditNode` now has a split source of truth but still inherits `setTabs()` from the base node, which only mutates `__tabs`.
`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/nodes/TabsNode.ts:75` updates `__tabs`, while `TabsEditNode` renders/serializes from `__tabLabels` + `__tabEditors` (`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/nodes/TabsEditNode.ts:47`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/nodes/TabsEditNode.ts:99`).  
If any generic code calls `setTabs()` on a `TabsEditNode`, UI/export state can silently diverge.

2. `medium` Content panel keys are derived from `ids` state while the rendered data comes from `tabEditors` props.
`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:209` updates `ids` via listener, but panels are rendered as `tabEditors.map(... key={ids[index]})` at `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:397`.  
Because those two sources update through different paths, add/reorder/remove can momentarily produce wrong/undefined keys and potentially reuse the wrong nested editor instance.

3. `low` The paragraph margin reset styles for editable tab content don’t match the actual DOM shape.
Selectors in `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts:1013` and `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts:1017` target direct children of `.rich-tabs-e-content`, but paragraphs are inside `.rich-tabs-e-editable` (`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:406`), so these rules are effectively no-ops.

4. `low` Keyboard accessibility is limited in the decorator controls.
Only `PointerSensor` is configured (`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:223`), and key controls are removed from tab order (`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:167`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:329`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:379`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:389`).

**Assumptions**
- I assumed no current caller uses `TabsEditNode.setTabs()`; if there is one, finding #1 should be treated as higher severity.
- I reviewed the new `TabsEditDecorator` file content directly (it is currently untracked) and did not run runtime tests in this read-only environment.
